title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad

lines.text: Central Perk, Phoebe, Rachel, Chandler, and Monica are there. Rachel is reading everyone's horoscope.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And your horoscope says, "On the fifth a special someone is going to give you a gift."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) Oh, well thank you in advance. (Kisses her.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Op, but the twelfth brings a lover's spat.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) You are going to make a joke about my special present! Why would you do that?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, wait and on the nineteenth a secret crush announces itself.
Phoebe winks and licks her lips while eyeing Chandler.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (ecstatic) Oh my God! It's Joey Tribbiani of Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.!!!!!!!
Everyone claps and cheers, Joey mimics looking about with a gun.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh that's right. It's your first day! So are you psyched to fight fake crime with your robot sidekick?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Am I psyched? The lead in my own TV series? I've dreamed about this for years! Why have I not been preparing?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! Joey, you're going to be great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But I got to act with a robot Pheebs, and-and I don't know anything about technology! I can't even use Chandler's computer except to find porn! And-and that's only 'cause it's right there when you turn it on!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think our lover's spat will start a little early this month.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (in a sexy voice to Chandler) I'll be waiting.
Opening Credits
Central Perk, time lapse. Phoebe is now looking at the covers of two different books.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you judging them by their covers? Because you're really not supposed to do that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, I'm just deciding which one to use-I'm gonna start writing another book!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Be-because the last one was such a big seller?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, if you must know I have written 14 books. And as I am the only one who has read them, I can tell you that they all have been very well received.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What are you guys doing later?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, Rachel and I have appointments to get our hair cut.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Phoebe) We do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I want to see what he wants first.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (continuing) I just found out that Elizabeth's dad wants to meet me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait a minute, hold the phone! You're not Elizabeth's dad?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on guys, I-I really want this guy to like me. It-it would really help me out if you guys were here to make me look good.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Of course we'll help! Yeah! We'll be here!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We know how tough those parent/teacher conferences can be.
Pier 59 Studios, it's the set of Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E. The producer is showing Joey around the set.

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: (walking into Mac's office) So uh, here's your office set!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! Huh? (Picks up the phone) Mac Macaveli, Private Investigator!

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: (checking his watch) Let's get you into wardrobe for a fitting.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Hey uh, when do I get to meet the robot?

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: I'm sorry, why don't we do that right now? He's right here. (Points to a guy.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: Joey Tribbiani, this is...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh wow! He's so lifelike! (Starts touching the guy's cheeks) Unbelievable! (He starts tugging on the guy's ears.

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: This is Wayne, the man who created and operates C.H.E.E.S.E.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (slaps Wayne on his cheek) How do you do there, Wayne? (Backs away.)

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: I'll let you two guys get acquainted, huh? (Walks away.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Sorry about that...(Mimics that cheek thing he just did.) Uh, so where's C.H.E.E.S.E.?

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: C.H.E.E.S.E. is right here. (He puts on his headset, picks up the controller, and wheels C.H.E.E.S.E. in. C.H.E.E.S.E. is just a plain old robot on tracks; he kinda looks like No. 5 in the movie Short Circuit.)

lines.speaker: C.H.E.E.S.E.
lines.text: (Wayne with a computerized voice) Nice to meet you Mac!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughs) This is like the temporary robot, right?

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: No. Why?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I-I just, I just it was going to be like a really cool robot, y'know? Like the terminator or uh, when I first saw you.

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: I spent two years developing this machine, it's absolutely state of the art.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sorry, it just-I don't know it doesn't really look like it can do anything.

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: It can do this. (He moves C.H.E.E.S.E.'s arm close to Joey's special area and he jumps back.)

Central Perk, Ross is at the counter drinking coffee as Elizabeth enters with her dad, Paul. Elizabeth goes to kiss Ross, but he just kisses her on the forehead. By the way Paul is played by Bruce Willis. Yes, that Bruce Willis from Moonlighting, Die Hard, and Armageddon.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: This is my father, Paul Stevens. Dad, this is Ross Geller.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It-it's great to meet you Paul.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I usually prefer Elizabeth's boyfriends to address me as Mr. Stevens.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Of course, of course, Mr. Stevens.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: So Ross, what your problem?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Eh-wh-Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Why can't you get a girlfriend your own age?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's funny. Umm.... (Pause, then serious) It's not funny.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I don't like you going out with my daughter Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. I can, I can see that. Umm, but I think if you give me umm, one chance I can, I can change your mind.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Okay. I'll give you one chance to change my mind. (Ross laughs in relief) You got one minute. (Ross suddenly gets worried.)

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Daddy!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Fine! Two minutes. Go.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: This is-you-(Ross starts laughing.)

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: (laughs then checking his watch) 1 minute 50 seconds.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, umm I want you to know that I have never done anything like this before. I mean, I mean I've been in um, relationships in general, uh but I have never done it with a student-I mean I not-not it! I mean, I mean I don't-We haven't done it. Uh, I mean, I mean, we've-we've-we've done stuff. (Paul is not amused.) Okay, okay, a joke, a joke-lighten the mood. Umm, two guys go into a bar. One of them is Irish.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I'm Irish.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And the Irish guy wins the joke!
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe enter.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How crazy that we'd run into you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh God, thank you! (Runs and gives all of them a group hug.) Umm, uh, Mr. Stevens I'd like you to meet my friends uh, this is Phoebe, Monica, and Chandler.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're Elizabeth's father, huh? I can see now where she gets her rugged handsomeness.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (obviously attracted to him) Is-is-is there a-a Mrs. Stevens?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: There's a Mr. Bing!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: No, unfortunately Lizzie's mom passed away shortly after she was born. I raised her by myself.

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Monica
lines.text: (sympathetic) Ohh!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I get that a lot.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay umm, why don't we all take a seat, y'know? And uh, and I'll get us all some uh some coffees-(He goes to pull out Elizabeth's chair, but Paul steps in)-Yeah, why don't you. (Paul pulls out her chair) Uh and you guys can talk about whatever, whatever you want. Y'know? Whatever pops into your head. (He turns his back to Paul and Elizabeth and points to himself for Chandler, Monica, and Phoebe. Then he goes to order the coffee.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know, it is so strange seeing Ross here this time of day, 'cause usually he's got the children's hospital.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. Not looking for dates. (Monica turns in horror.)

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: So uh, Monica is Ross's sister.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And he's a great brother!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I had a sister.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: She passed away.

lines.speaker: Monica and Phoebe
lines.text: (sympathetic) Ohh!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Oh, you don't have to do that every time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But uh Ross, Ross is a great guy! I was roommates with him in college. Uh, funny story... (He starts laughing then notices that Paul isn't happy.) You're roommate in college died didn't he?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: A part of him did yes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (returning with the coffee) Okay here we are Paul, Elizabeth. (He sets down their cups.) So I hope you guys were finding something to talk about.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, we were just...
Rachel runs in.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi, I'm sorry I'm late but I am ready, ready to talk you up! When does Liz's father get here?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I'm already here.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Ross is sooo great!
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Phoebe is working on her book at the kitchen table, Monica is on the couch, and Chandler is entering from the bathroom carrying a package of toilet paper.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey honey, you got the kind with the little girl, you said we were gonna to get the kind with the baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, you said the baby creeps you out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, the little girl creeps me out.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You said the baby.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why would the baby creep me out?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why would the little girl creep you out?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (writing frantically) You guys, I'm sorry, could you please talk a little slower?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is going in your book?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, it's about relationships. Y'know? The traps, the pitfalls, what not to do, keep going. This stuff is great!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! Excuse me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And how none of it matters when the people really love each other. (Chandler and Monica kiss.) And how people will believe anything you tell them as long as it's a compliment.
Central Perk, Rachel is there alone as Paul enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (seeing him) Oh hi!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Hi! Hi. (He's looking around.) I think I left my keys here somewhere.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Well let's look for them. (Finds some under one of the couch cushions. It has a pink, fuzzy ball on the key chain.) Oh-oh-hey! Are these them?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right! (Throws them back under the cushion.)

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Oh, here they are right here. (Picks them up from underneath the corner of the couch.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh good.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Thanks for your help. (Starts to leave.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (chasing after him) Oh, wait! Sorry, Mr. Paul? Mr. Paul?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Just call me Paul.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Paul. Umm, I just wanted you to know that Ross really is a great guy.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Well maybe you can date him then that would save me the trouble of killing him. (Rachel laughs then starts looking at him.) Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You just don't look old enough to have a twenty-year-old daughter.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Well, we were very young when we had her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh. We?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Well yeah, it usually, it takes two people to... (He taps his index fingers together.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no! Yes! Of course, I know that! I just-I meant y'know are you still a 'We' or are you just 'You?'

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I'm just me, my wife died shortly after Lizzie was born.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sympathetic) Ohh. So you raised her all on your own?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Yes I did.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh. (She touches his arm for support and likes what she feels) Ooh!
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Phoebe is still writing in her book, Chandler and Monica are in the kitchen as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How was your first day?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pretty great! Except I did get a little attitude from the robot.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Damn those robots, they're supposed to be our faithful servants!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Anyway, it wasn't the robot, it was the guy who controls him. Yeah, he doesn't like me. He had C.H.E.E.S.E. knock over the sandwich right when I was reaching for one! Ohh!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, why don't you just get him fired?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I may have to, I hate to do it, but I'm the star! Y'know? There's a limit to how many sandwiches I can eat off the floor. (His cell phone rings) Excuse me. (Answers it, on phone) Joey Tribbiani.

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: (on the other end) Joe! I'm glad I found ya, I got an audition for ya!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: The thing is it's kinda on the Q.T. The actor who has the part doesn't know he might be fired. It's the lead in a series, Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm the lead in Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.!!

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: Uh-oh!
Joey and Rachel's, Ross is entering looking for Joey, but instead he finds Paul and Rachel making out on the couch.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey?!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Hi Ross.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I was just getting him to like you.
Commercial Break
Joey and Rachel's, scene is continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey?! Joey!! (He runs into his bedroom.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, Joey is not here.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I'll just wait for him in here!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, it's okay. You can come out.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Yeah Ross it's okay, it's me, Mr. Stevens.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (coming out of the bedroom) Oh! Oh my God! I didn't even see you!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Sure you did! You came in, you got all awkward, and you ran into the bedroom. You were shouting, "Joey! Joey!" Bye Rach. (Kisses her.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I'll call you later. Bye Ross. (Leaves)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What-what-what the-how da-how did-what the-how did-what?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, y'know he lost his keys so he was looking for them...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (incredulous) In your mouth?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Downstairs! And we got to talking y'know, for like two hours, and I really liked him so I invited him up here for a cup of coffee.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You were at the coffeehouse!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, what's the big deal? So I kissed the guy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He is my girlfriend's father, okay? It's-it's, it's weird!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wh-You dated my sister!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That was different!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? Why?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: This is weird for me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross look, look this is good for you. Okay? Let's face it, so far the guy's not lovin' ya! But I can turn that around! I got the inside track! We can all go out to dinner, y'know? And I can talk you up! Ross, the guy is a very, very successful lawyer!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How is that important?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh it's important!
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Joey is telling everyone about his impending termination at Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Apparently, there's like a million guys out there that can play Mac, and there's only this one robot and this one guy who controls it! I didn't know he could get me fired! What am I going to do?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well y'know Joey, you're a pretty charming guy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks, but I kinda have a problem to deal with here.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No sweetie, you've got to win over the guy that controls C.H.E.E.S.E.! You've got to kiss some serious robot ass!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's not a bad idea. Yeah. Okay, but if I got to turn on the charm tomorrow I'm not wasting anymore of it over here with you guys. (Starts to leave, but stops and turns to Phoebe.) Well, actually I got a little bit saved for you Pheebs. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So do you think uh, Joey's more charming than me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! That's why I'm sleeping with him on the side.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, you wish. (Stops to think about it and gets depressed.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (writing in her book) "You wish."

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, stop writing about us!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm not writing about you! I'm writing about other people.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Marcia and Chester.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay fine! Fine! Then you know what, I'll just write about Phyllis! Hmm!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hmm.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (writing on a piece of paper) Phyllis is sitting in a chair.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I see what you're doing!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (still writing) Phyllis sees what I'm doing.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh-oh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, I have tasted my own medicine and it is bitter!
Pier 59 Studios, Joey is walking up to C.H.E.E.S.E. and Wayne.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Morning! Hey, how's my favorite genius and my little robot buddy?! (Pats C.H.E.E.S.E. on the head.)

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: Don't touch him!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay! (He yanks his hand away.) All right. Umm, all right Wayne, level with me. Okay? I-I keep hearing all these rumors that I might get fired. Okay, they even have actors coming in to read for my part! Come on man, you-you got to give me a second chance! I mean, I love-I love this little guy! (He grabs C.H.E.E.S.E.'s arm and pulls it off at the elbow.) Ah-ah!! (Wayne is shocked.) Okay, that's why you didn't want me to touch him right? Here you go! Okay? (Hands Wayne the arm and he goes to fix it. Meanwhile Joey starts to berate himself.) Stupid! I can't believe it! God! (A very beautiful woman walks by.) (To her) Hey, how you doin'? (He and her go over to talk and Wayne looks on with envy.)
A Restaurant, Ross and Rachel are on their double date. Rachel is busy talking Ross up.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So it seemed that my prom date had stood me up, so Ross selflessly, offered to take me.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: What a nice story!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: So Ross was in college and decided to jump at the chance to take a young girl to her high school prom.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I definitely did not see that one backfiring! I'm gonna go to the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, take your time.
Rachel heads for the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Paul) Just-just so you know I was a freshman and she was a senior. So it wasn't as bad as-as...

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Ross, look, I know I've been giving you a lot of jabs and it's partly because I'm very protective of Lizzie, and partly because well, they just keep coming to me. But I have to admit that after all the wonderful things that Lizzie has told me and the many, many, (pause) many stories that Rachel has told me that, well (pause) you're not (pause) all bad.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Not all bad.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: And anyhow, I'm sorry I was so harsh before, but you have to understand that I (pause) still look at Lizzie like she's a twelve-year-old girl.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. You know what? I know what you mean; I do that too.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I beg your pardon?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! No! Not-I don't mean I-I see her as a twelve-year-old girl! I mean I-I have a son, who's umm six and I still think of him as a baby.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: You have a son?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, well my-my ex-wife and I share custody of Ben and umm, uh, and just so you know, Carol and I are on excellent terms as I'm sure you are with your wife! (Realizes) Oh, I'm sorry! (To Elizabeth) It's unbelievable!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Don't worry about it, I just didn't realize you were married. (Rachel returns and hears that.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh we were, but that was just a (pause as the audience reacts), I mean that was just a big drunken mistake.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're back.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: You two were married?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Whoops! I'm sorry, you were talking about Emily!
Ross slams his head down on the table.
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Monica and Chandler are entering and they're arguing.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, we said we would meet at the coffeehouse at six.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We said seven!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We said six!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The only way that I said six would be if the seven's, let meet at seven, not at six.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah and if I had seven, maybe I would've said something like this, "Wow! My boyfriend's such a wise ass-seven!"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Turning around in the chair) Hi!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my good God.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ugh!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know what time you said.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well actually, I know what time Chester and Marcia said.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What time?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Quite an interesting turn of events, suddenly it's my book to the rescue, huh? (Reading her book) Ooh, very interesting. Yeah, well this certainly clears things up.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (disgusted) What does it say?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I will tell you as soon as you thank me for writing my book.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thank you for writing your book. Its-its uh, great book and you are the queen of everything.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thanks! So are you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) I told you I should not wear this color. (He's wearing a reddish-orange sweater.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (reading from her book) Mon... (Pause as she restarts) Marcia and Chester are planning on seeing a movie on Sunday night. Marcia thinks they're supposed to meet at six, Chester thinks it's at seven.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you knew we were gonna miss the movie!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's right.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Inside of telling us you decided to write in your stupid book!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (writing in her book) Marcia and Chester are mad at Phyllis.
Joey's Dressing Room, Joey and Chandler are there.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can't believe I'm going to lose this job!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh I'm so sorry man! Is there anything I can do?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Help me get this mini-fridge past the security guard.
There's a knock on the door and Joey answers it to Wayne.

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: Hey Joey, I want to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah? Well, I don't want to talk to you Wayne! I hate you! You ruined my life! Oh, Chandler, Wayne. Wayne, Chandler. (They shake hands.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi, how are ya?

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: Joey, Joey, I-I-I'll g-get you your job back if you help me out.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (incredulous) Why should I help you?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (whispering in Joey's ear) The reason he just said.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (happily) What do you need?

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: I-I-I saw you on stage talking to that beautiful woman, y'know Sarah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: I wish I could talk to her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What are you in love with her or something?

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: Yeah. Her. All of them. Anyone.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I've been there my friend.

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: Listen, I-I guarantee you keep your job if you can teach me how to talk to women like you do.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh wow Wayne, it's not really something you can teach y'know? It's pretty much something you're born with if you-(Off Chandler's look)-You-you can teach it! I'll show you right how to do it.
A Restaurant, Rachel is still trying to talk up Ross, not to much success.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I mean if you think about it, I mean Ross did learn something from each marriage.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: How to make the next one even shorter?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Now wait a minute that's not fair. He was married to me a hell of a lot longer than he was married to Emily, he just didn't tell me. (Everyone looks at her, Ross not happily.) Maybe I have to pee again. (Gets up to try to use the bathroom.)

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Well, this is fun. So Ross, did you kill any of these wives?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? I-I-I... I-I have had enough of this! Y'know, I-I-I care a great deal about your daughter and I have treated her with nothing but respect! So if-if you've got a problem with me, frankly...

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Are you yelling at me?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: God no!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Y'know what daddy? If you don't like Ross, that's fine. It doesn't matter to me, I'm gonna go out with him anyway.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Really?! (She nods in the affirmative.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well if it doesn't matter to her, it doesn't matter to me! (to Paul) Still not yelling!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Wow. What can I say? (Pause, pointing at Ross) This doesn't make me like you any better!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's okay, I'm not so crazy about myself right now either.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Then we agree?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh yeah, I guess-Yeah! I guess so.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Neither of us like Ross!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: I like Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ohhh! Kids!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (returning) Wait-wait-wait, I just thought of another story about how nice Ross is!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's okay Rach, we're not liking Ross right now.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! I've got a lot of those too!
Ending Credits
Mac's Office, Mac is talking to C.H.E.E.S.E. about their case.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, it turns out you were right C.H.E.E.S.E.

lines.speaker: C.H.E.E.S.E.
lines.text: The shipment never made it through Omaha?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You got it! And the rabbi's beard, 100% horsehair. Nice catch C.H.E.E.S.E.! (Pauses as he waits for C.H.E.E.S.E.'s next line.) It's your line C.H.E.E.S.E.! (Suddenly C.H.E.E.S.E. goes crazy and starts flinging it's arms and advancing on Joey behind the desk.) Wayne! Wayne!!

The camera cuts to Wayne who's busy making out with Sarah and rubbing C.H.E.E.S.E.'s controller on her back causing C.H.E.E.S.E. to go crazy. Joey starts throwing books at C.H.E.E.S.E. to get him to stop.
End
